title: Luffy Falls Under Colors Trap
description: On pages 1–4, luffy falls under colors trap as miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display.
scene: Luffy Falls Under Colors Trap. Miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy! We don't have any time left! so hurry up and do something about this thing!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...Yeah, I know.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you know, then hurry the hell up!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I know but...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't want to help you...!

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: What's that supposed to mean!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You do realize we're about to become wax- figures!? That we're on the verge of DEATH!!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...yeah, but I just don't feel like doing anything about it.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's not a matter of whether you feel like it, just help us already!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What the heck happen- Ened to him!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If we don't hurry up, our friends will be killed! We gotta bring him back to his senses!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Let's go, Karoo!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: give it up, he's already fallen into a trap.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: That's right. Just look at what's below his feet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Below his feet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh? There's some sort of weird black drawing...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What exactly is that thing...!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Oh, it's nothing. Just a simple painting.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: kyahahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Pain- Ting!?

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: In other words, this is the end of both you and your little friends!

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Karoo! Run for it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Run as fast as you can!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Planning to run away on the bird!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait, wait! I haven't gotten on you yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're chasing after them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Miss Goldenweek,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Hey! I said stop! Let me on f...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Puaa- Ack!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: What're you getting scared of me for!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is your doing, isn't it!?

summary: This part centers on luffy falls under colors trap, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
